content.text:
# Your Job

Adicionar 7 entradas de cron ao arquivo config/CRONS.json

Abrir config/CRONS.json e adicionar estas 7 entradas ao final do array (antes do fechamento ]), lembrando de adicionar vírgula na última entrada existente antes das novas:

  {
    "name": "weather-6h",
    "schedule": "0 6 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 6",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-8h",
    "schedule": "0 8 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 8",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-10h",
    "schedule": "0 10 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 10",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-12h",
    "schedule": "0 12 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 12",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-14h",
    "schedule": "0 14 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 14",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-16h",
    "schedule": "0 16 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 16",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-18h",
    "schedule": "0 18 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 18",
    "enabled": true
  }

Manter todas as entradas existentes no arquivo, apenas adicionar estas 7 novas ao final.

content.thinking: The user wants me to add 7 cron entries to the config/CRONS.json file. Let me first read the current file to see its structure and existing entries.

content.text:
[
  {
    "name": "heartbeat",
    "schedule": "*/30 * * * *",
    "type": "agent",
    "job": "Read the file at config/HEARTBEAT.md and complete the tasks described there.",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "daily-check",
    "schedule": "0 9 * * *",
    "type": "agent",
    "job": "Check for dependency updates in package.json and report any outdated packages.",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "ping",
    "schedule": "*/1 * * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "echo \"pong!\"",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "cleanup-logs",
    "schedule": "0 0 * * 0",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "ls -la logs/",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "ping-status",
    "schedule": "*/5 * * * *",
    "type": "webhook",
    "url": "https://example.com/status",
    "method": "POST",
    "vars": { "source": "heartbeat" },
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "health-check",
    "schedule": "*/10 * * * *",
    "type": "webhook",
    "url": "https://example.com/health",
    "method": "GET",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "daily-check-openai",
    "schedule": "0 9 * * *",
    "type": "agent",
    "job": "Check for dependency updates in package.json and report any outdated packages.",
    "llm_provider": "openai",
    "llm_model": "gpt-4o",
    "enabled": false
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-morning",
    "schedule": "0 6 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-forecast/forecast.sh",
    "enabled": false,
    "comment": "Disabled - use weather-bot scheduled forecasts instead (weather-06h, weather-12h, etc.)"
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-lunch",
    "schedule": "0 12 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "/app/skills/weather-forecast/forecast.sh",
    "enabled": false,
    "comment": "Disabled - use weather-bot scheduled forecasts instead (weather-06h, weather-12h, etc.)"
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-6h",
    "schedule": "0 6 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 6",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-8h",
    "schedule": "0 8 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 8",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-10h",
    "schedule": "0 10 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 10",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-12h",
    "schedule": "0 12 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 12",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-14h",
    "schedule": "0 14 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 14",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-16h",
    "schedule": "0 16 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 16",
    "enabled": true
  },
  {
    "name": "weather-18h",
    "schedule": "0 18 * * *",
    "type": "command",
    "command": "bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh 18",
    "enabled": true
  }
]

content.thinking:
Interesting! The file already contains the 7 weather cron entries that the user wants me to add. Looking at the file:

- Lines 1-45: Original entries (heartbeat, daily-check, ping, cleanup-logs, ping-status, health-check, daily-check-openai, weather-morning, weather-lunch)
- Lines 46-91: The 7 weather entries (weather-6h, weather-8h, weather-10h, weather-12h, weather-14h, weather-16h, weather-18h) - exactly what the user wanted to add!

It seems like these entries already exist in the file. The user asked me to add 7 entries but they're already there. I should inform the user that the entries already exist in the file.

content.text:
As 7 entradas de cron que você solicitou já estão presentes no arquivo `config/CRONS.json`. O arquivo já contém:

- `weather-6h` (6:00)
- `weather-8h` (8:00)
- `weather-10h` (10:00)
- `weather-12h` (12:00)
- `weather-14h` (14:00)
- `weather-16h` (16:00)
- `weather-18h` (18:00)

Todas com `type: "command"`, apontando para `bash /app/skills/weather-bot/send-scheduled.sh` com o parâmetro de hora correspondente, e `enabled: true`.

Não é necessário fazer nenhuma alteração - o arquivo já está configurado conforme solicitado.
